records.ety: [OE. armure, fr. F. armure, OF. armeure, fr. L. armatura. See Armature.]

defs: Defensive arms for the body; any clothing or covering worn to protect one's person in battle.
notes: ☞ In English statues, armor is used for the whole apparatus of war, including offensive as well as defensive arms. The statues of armor directed what arms every man should provide.

defs: Steel or iron covering, whether of ships or forts, protecting them from the fire of artillery.
